result:
Built the Midnight Brew landing page across three files:

- `index.html` — sticky nav with brand, Hero (eyebrow + headline + subtitle + "View Menu" button), Menu section with 3 cards (Espresso $3.50, Americano $4.00, Caramel Macchiato $5.25), and footer with address/hours/copyright.
- `styles.css` — clean white-mode design using Playfair Display + Inter, warm caramel accent (`#c08457`). Button has a lift + color-shift hover effect; cards lift on hover. Responsive breakpoints at 860px (menu collapses to 1 column) and 560px (typography/padding tuned for phones).
- `script.js` — smooth-scroll handler for in-page nav links.

Open `index.html` directly in a browser to view.
